query: SELECT um.canonical_hash AS "canonical_hash!: Vec<u8>", um.created_at AS "created_at!: i64", so.payload AS "payload?: Vec<u8>", so.signature AS "signature!: Vec<u8>" FROM user_moves um JOIN signed_objects so ON so.canonical_hash = um.canonical_hash WHERE um.user_key = ? AND so.payload IS NOT NULL AND ( ? IS NULL OR um.created_at > ? OR (um.created_at = ? AND um.canonical_hash > ?) ) ORDER BY um.created_at ASC, um.canonical_hash ASC LIMIT ?
